subcodes.first_line: O intimate companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For a time you dwelt in this Most Great Prison and in Haifa, occupied in service to the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همدم عبدالبهاء مدتی در این سجن اعظم و حیفا بودی و بخدمات یاران مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
